theme_details.mode: Dark theme default, with Light mode toggle

headings.style: Radical weight contrast. Use font-black (800) for large headings, very tight tracking.
headings.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tighter leading-none

grids.tetris: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12 (Use for Feature and Sport Selection cards)
grids.control_room: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6 (Use for Profile Stats and Analytics)

components.navigation: Sticky nav with h-[64px]. z-50. Dark mode: bg-[#1C0A30]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10. Light mode: bg-[#F4F2F8]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1C0A30]/10. Wordmark logo text-xl font-black tracking-tighter.

buttons.primary: bg-[var(--amber)] text-white rounded-[50px] px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[var(--amber-light)] transition-colors shadow-lg hover:shadow-[var(--amber)]/30 hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.ghost: border-2 border-[var(--purple-accent)] text-white dark:text-white light:text-[var(--text-dark)] rounded-[50px] px-8 py-3 font-semibold hover:bg-[var(--purple-accent)]/10 transition-colors hover:-translate-y-0.5

cards.dark_mode: bg-[var(--dark-card)]/80 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)]
cards.light_mode: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-[#1C0A30]/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(28,10,48,0.05)]

components.cta_band: Grape Labs AI CTA band. Full width, heavy use of the deep-ink to royal-purple gradient. Kinetic typography for 'Find your people. Race your best.'
components.accordion: Use Shadcn accordion. No background, border-b only. Clean, simple font.

home: Hero section: Split layout or dynamic center. Floating profile card mockups demonstrating 'Match Percentage'. Use high-contrast background (abstract dark purple texture overlay).
Sport Selection Cards: Bento grid layout displaying Hyrox, Marathon, Ironman. Use Glassmorphism cards with background images fading in.
Stats & Events Teaser: Control room layout for stats. Marquee with event badges moving slowly across the screen.
Grape Labs CTA Band: Distinct section at the bottom.
how_it_works: Timeline layout using vertical staggered dots.
find_a_partner: Filter sidebar (left) and Match Results grid (right).
Match cards must emphasize Match % (Amber color) and Sport type.
events: Countdown chips on each event card using tabular-nums for numbers.
profile_my_connections: Profile detail header. Tabs for My Connections (Pending, Active).
Profile stats using the control room grid format.
onboarding: Multi-step wizard with a top progress bar (Amber). Clean, focused, card-in-center layout.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark purple texture for hero background overlay

sport_marathon.description: Athlete running fast at night with motion blur for Marathon card

sport_hyrox.description: Gym athlete representing Crossfit/Hyrox for sport selection card

sport_ironman.description: Triathlon/Ironman athlete wearing hat for sport selection card

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the CSS variables provided. Build the Tailwind config to map these exact hex codes.

Implement the dark/light mode toggle with localStorage persistence. Rely on 'dark:' variants heavily and alternate section backgrounds explicitly on your container wrappers (e.g., alternating background_odd / background_even classes depending on section index).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
Ensure 'Inter' font is imported from Google Fonts. Use weight 800 (font-black) and tight tracking for dramatic headings to balance the lack of display font.
Components must use glassmorphism with exact specs: 20px radius, backdrop blur, white/10 borders in dark mode. Map this directly to Tailwind utility classes.
Do NOT use any emojis across the entire app. Use Lucide React icons exclusively.
Ensure section spacing is exactly 96px on desktop and 56px on mobile (use py-[56px] md:py-[96px]).
For the Marquee with event badges, use a fast marquee implementation. Keep the speed slow and elegant.
Do NOT override the colors or component behaviors specified above. The exact design system MUST be adhered to.
